description: Style NoteThese lotto Futura 500 TF shoes reference the soccer cleats in silhouetting and style, but have a flat outsole. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these shoes are designed for casual outings Product DetailsRed shoe with central lace-ups and overlaysPadded tongue and innerPhylon midsolePunto Flex grooves and durable TPU plate with strategically placed circular lugs Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
